steps.title: Recognize slope-intercept form
steps.content: The equation $y = 34x + 81$ is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, where $m$ is the slope and $b$ is the $y$-intercept value. Here, $m = 34$ and $b = 81$.

steps.title: Identify the y-intercept point
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept is where the line crosses the $y$-axis, occurring when $x = 0$. Since the $y$-intercept value is $b = 81$, the $y$-intercept point is $(0, 81)$.

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
